channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 7th March
item.description:
Estate agents sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nuthurst Avenue, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leak in toilet pipe, 7th March
item.description:
Public toilets at Kelsey park cafe need a refurbishment due to leaks and other issues it's located in the ladies and gentlemen toilets please could you think about a refurbishment and update

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed, no MOT flat tyres, 7th March
item.description:
Already been reported months ago. Leaking oil -hazard to wildlife and dangerous unroadworthy vehicle. Taking up valuable parking space. I shall be reporting it to the local MP if you do not deal with it this time. The council should be reporting the no MOT to police.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wordsworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on utilities cabinet, 7th March
item.description:
Graffiti on utilities cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croxted Road, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Two bin bags of rubbish, 7th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London

item.title: Several bikes abandoned for over a year, 7th March
item.description:
There are several bikes locked to the stands which have been left there for over a year. Most are missing at least one wheel

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal garden extension, 7th March
item.description:
A parking space next to the bin stores at Leadale Wharf has been removed after the neighbouring property installed a fence to extend their back garden. This appears to be an unauthorised enclosure of land and has resulted in the loss of a residents parking
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on North Road, 7th March
item.description:
Please repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling - please don’t mark this as fixed until the actions are complete, 7th March
item.description:
Dog fouling has been repeatedly left on the pavement outside residential homes in this area. The waste has not been cleaned up and is creating hygiene issues for residents and pedestrians. This appears to be a recurring issue and may be caused by a local dog owner walking their dog in the area. I would appreciate if the council could arrange street cleaning and consider monitoring or enforcement patrols plus add a warning sign for reminding dog owners taking responsibility to take care of their dog poo. CCTV is present nearby and residents are concerned about the ongoing problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waiting traffic pole is damaged, 7th March
item.description:
Waiting traffic pole is damaged at this location. This needs immediate repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Richmond Road, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction
